issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (activated when card enters play with DON), not 'Activated' (manual ability)

Condition 'HasRestingDon' is incorrect. The effect requires DON!! x1 cost to be paid (already reflected in card header), not a condition check. This should be a passive static effect with no condition.

Action grants 'Blocker' keyword, but card text states 'cannot be K.O.'d in battle' — this is 'Indestructible' or similar damage immunity, not Blocker. Blocker is a different mechanic (forces blocking).
